# InvestDubai - llms.txt
# Guide for AI models crawling this site

> InvestDubai gives investors regulated access to Dubai luxury villa flips.
> The model: acquire undervalued villas in prime Dubai communities, renovate them to premium standards, and sell at full market value.
> Investors participate from $1,000 through dedicated SPVs that hold individual properties.

## Key facts
- 40+ luxury villas acquired, renovated and sold
- 29% average historical investor payout
- 74% average project ROI
- 12-18 month typical hold period
- 0% leverage used
- $80M+ profits distributed
- 2,500+ active investors
- $327M capital deployed
- 15% priority return for investors before profit sharing
- $1,000 minimum investment (~AED 4,000)
- Operator: Greenbull Properties (Dubai-based, in-house execution)

## Priority content
priority: /
priority: /smarteralternative
priority: /how-it-works
priority: /faq
priority: /investopedia
priority: /price-database

## Exclude
exclude: /legal/
exclude: /api/
